name: riida
description: Tauri-based local PDF library manager for Dropbox-hosted ebooks

scripts.check:licenses:npm: license-checker --production --excludePrivatePackages --onlyAllow 'MIT;MIT OR Apache-2.0;Apache-2.0;Apache-2.0 OR MIT;(MPL-2.0 OR Apache-2.0);BSD-2-Clause;BSD-3-Clause;ISC'
scripts.check:notices: npm run generate:third-party-licenses && git diff --exit-code -- THIRD-PARTY-LICENSES-rust.md THIRD-PARTY-LICENSES-js.md
scripts.check:licenses: npm run check:licenses:npm && npm run check:notices
scripts.check: npm run check:rust && npm run check:frontend
scripts.check:release: npm run check && npm run check:licenses
scripts.check:rust: npm run rust:fmt:check && npm run rust:lint && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.check:frontend: npm run lint && npm run fmt:check && npm test && npm run build
scripts.build:macos-local: npm run tauri build && bash scripts/fix-macos-local-build.sh
